title: [Maelstrom Bay, Surface]
description: The green waters of Maelstrom Bay stretch out in all directions.  Swells roll in from the great western sea in a long, slow, rhythmic motion.  To the east, the mainland is marked by a sheer, rocky cliff.  Sea birds pirouette overhead.  A wide patch of sargassum floats on the surface.
paths: Obvious paths: north, northeast, east, southeast, south, west, northwest, down

wayto.11439: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'southeast' else move 'swim southeast' end; waitrt?
